RANKMODE

Rank Mode is the competitive league of Hoodlympics — a structured, season-based ladder where every 1v1 match counts toward your official rating. Launching with the mobile app.

⚔️
Placement Matches
Play 10 placement matches at any partner gym to earn your starting rank. Every game matters from day one.
📈
ELO Rating System
Beat higher-ranked players, earn more. Lose to lower-ranked ones, fall harder. Your rating is a true reflection of skill.
🏅
7 Rank Tiers
Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum → Diamond → Master → Grandmaster. Each tier unlocks exclusive gym privileges.
🗺️
Regional Ladders
Compete in your city, your region, or go for the national leaderboard. Rank Mode is geo-aware — climb locally first.
🛡️
Court Defense
Kings must accept ranked challenges within 24 hours or automatically forfeit their crown. No hiding allowed.
🏆
Season Rewards
End-of-season trophies, profile badges, and exclusive gym perks for top finishers. Season 1 drops with the mobile app.
How Rank Mode Works
1
Get Placed
Complete 10 placement matches at any partner gym
2
Climb the Ladder
Win ranked matches to gain ELO and move up tiers
3
Claim Courts
Challenge Kings at gyms — beat them to take the crown
4
End the Season
Top players earn rewards, badges, and gym privileges

GET EARLY ACCESS

Be first to know when Rank Mode drops on mobile.

The story
WHAT IS
HOODLYMPICS?

We're turning every gym, court, and sports venue in your neighborhood into a battleground — and giving local athletes a stage to prove they're the best.

📍
Location-Based
Like Pokémon Go but for real athletes. Partner gyms appear on your map as live arenas. The closer you are, the more you can compete.
👑
King of the Court
Every gym has a King and Queen per sport. Win enough matches at a gym to claim the crown. Lose a challenge and the crown transfers.
⚡
Instant Challenges
See who's near your gym right now. Send a challenge, pick a sport, confirm the venue, and play — all from your phone.
HOW IT WORKS

From opening the app to claiming your first crown

1
Create your profile
Sign up, pick your sports, and set your location. Your profile tracks your record, ELO rating, and crown history across all sports.
2
Find a gym on the map
Open the live map to see partner gyms near you. Each gym shows the current King or Queen per sport and who's actively challenging.
3
Challenge a player
Tap any nearby player or the current King to send a challenge. Pick the sport, confirm the gym, agree on a time, and show up.
4
Submit your result
After the match, both players confirm the score in-app. Ratings update instantly. Win the King's crown and it's yours until someone takes it.
